name: Crab & Corn Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Position the knife blade in the processor.
2. Add half of the frozen corn and process until finely chopped.
3. Add the remaining corn and stir well, then set aside.
4. In a small bowl, combine the cornstarch and water; stir well and set aside.
5. In a large saucepan, combine the chicken broth and ginger root. Bring to a boil.
6. Add the corn, cornstarch mixture, crabmeat, green onions, pepper, and rice vinegar to the boiling saucepan.
7. Return to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 3 minutes.
